entries.title: GCP Reserved Instance Coverage Overlay
entries.notes: Pulls GCP Resource Manager API to list compute instances, cross-references with existing reservations via Cloud Billing API, shows coverage % badge per project. Simple dashboard with a donut chart and export to CSV. Niche tool that GCP cost optimization teams will discover via search.
entries.pain: Engineers waste money on on-demand resources when reserved capacity would cut cloud bills by 30% but tracking coverage is manual.

entries.title: Email Thread Decision Point Tagger
entries.notes: Uses keyword detection (approve, reject, decide, wait for) plus sender authority scoring to highlight decision nodes in Gmail threads. Free tier caps at 10 threads/month. Solves a real daily pain that no email app addresses natively.
entries.pain: Workers lose track of where critical decisions happen in long email threads, causing delays and missed context.

entries.title: CSS Cascade Layer Weight Visualizer
entries.notes: Inspects the CSS cascade, extracts @layer declarations, renders a visual hierarchy showing which layers override others. Injects a floating panel on any page. Niche but discoverable via CSS community posts about cascade layers.
entries.pain: Debugging cascade layer precedence requires mental gymnastics; developers can't see which layers win without computed styles hunting.

entries.title: Cold Email Icebreaker Asset Detector
entries.notes: Scrapes LinkedIn profile, finds mutual groups, shared college alumni, co-authored content, then drafts personalized icebreakers. Free tier gives 5 lookups/day. Bridges the personalization gap that makes cold email feel cold.
entries.pain: Sales reps spend 15+ minutes researching prospects manually when mutual connections or shared interests could be found automatically.

entries.title: JWT Token Structure Inspector
entries.notes: Detects JWTs in network requests and localStorage, decodes header/payload/signature, highlights expired tokens and missing claims. Adds an overlay icon when JWT is present. Quick win tool for any auth-heavy app.
entries.pain: Developers debugging auth issues waste time decoding JWTs manually when a quick visual breakdown would instantly show claims, expiry, and errors.

entries.title: Lead Company Funding Event Monitor
entries.notes: Monitors SEC filings, Crunchbase, and news APIs for funding announcements, alerts when a prospect raises money. Per-seat pricing for CRM integration. High intent signal that sales teams actively seek.
entries.pain: Sales teams miss timing their outreach to funding events, losing the moment when prospects have budget and urgency.

entries.title: Gong Call Filler Word Coach
entries.notes: Uploads Gong transcript, counts filler words per speaker, compares to team average, suggests improvement. Free tier analyzes 2 calls/month. Simple NLP that Gong users will find when searching for call coaching.
entries.pain: Sales reps have no idea how often they say um, like, and basically during calls, missing easy coaching opportunities.

entries.title: Browser Tab Semantic Clusterer
entries.notes: Uses LLM to analyze tab titles and URLs, auto-groups tabs into semantic clusters with labels. Single-click to collapse/expand clusters. Lightweight compared to full tab managers; adds intelligence rather than just grouping.
entries.pain: Professionals accumulate 50+ tabs with no organization, making finding the right tab a frustrating scavenger hunt.

entries.title: Webhook Schema Evolution Tracker
entries.notes: Logs webhook payloads over time, detects schema additions/removals/changes, alerts on breaking modifications. Stores history locally and shows diffs. Useful for teams integrating with Stripe, Twilio, and similar.
entries.pain: Teams miss when webhook providers silently change payload schemas, causing silent failures in production.

entries.title: Sales Deck Reading Pace Advisor
entries.notes: Uses screen share analysis to detect slide change frequency, estimates reading pace, shows a subtle speedometer overlay. Presenter can glance at it to self-regulate. Novel angle on sales coaching.
entries.pain: Sales reps often present too fast in meetings, but have no real-time feedback to slow down and land key points.

entries.title: API Error Message Search Engine
entries.notes: Right-click any error message in console, searches Stack Overflow, GitHub issues, and vendor docs, returns ranked solutions with upvote counts. Context-aware filtering by framework. Replaces manual search habit.
entries.pain: Developers copy-paste cryptic error messages into Google and sift through stale Stack Overflow links to find solutions.

entries.title: Competitor Glassdoor Sentiment Shift Alert
entries.notes: Scrapes Glassdoor reviews weekly, tracks sentiment trends by category (management, culture, compensation), alerts on sudden drops. B2B SaaS pricing for teams. Rare data angle that outbound teams will value.
entries.pain: Sales teams miss employee sentiment changes at competitors that signal hiring freezes, morale issues, or departures worth exploiting.

entries.title: Browser Notification Priority Sorter
entries.notes: AI-scores notifications by sender importance, recency, and keywords, auto-collapses low-priority ones, surfaces high-priority to top. Learns from user behavior over time. Simple but addresses a universal pain.
entries.pain: Chrome notifications flood workers constantly, making it impossible to focus on what actually matters without a manual triage system.

entries.title: PR Description Completion Scorer
entries.notes: GitHub PR listener that analyzes description length, presence of what/why/testing sections, linked tickets, and screenshots. Scores 0-100 with specific improvement suggestions. Integrates as a PR check. Dev team productivity angle.
entries.pain: Code reviewers waste time on PRs with vague descriptions, often requesting clarification that could be avoided if completeness were scored upfront.

entries.title: Design Token Diffusion Tracker
entries.notes: Scans DOM for CSS custom properties, maps them to design token names, shows adoption percentage across components. Highlights outdated hardcoded values. Dashboard view for design system health. Niche but searchable.
entries.pain: Design systems teams lose track of which components adopt new tokens, creating visual inconsistency that goes undetected until user complaints.
